content_of_post_to_answer: How do I release anxiety and emotional blocks naturally?
answer: One thing people often miss is that anxiety and emotional blocks are not always things you "release." Many are patterns your mind keeps recreating because it believes they are protecting you from something. The more aggressively you try to get rid of them, the more attention and energy you feed them. A useful question is not "How do I stop feeling this?" but "What is this feeling trying to prevent?" I've explored this dynamic in a few other pieces on my Quora profile if you're interested. Often the block weakens when it no longer has a job to do.
